message:
chore: bump fsfs version to 1.1.3 for release

Includes: PDF extraction, LLM query expansion, progress indicator,
six installer fixes, embedded-models feature, and seven code review fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "1.1.2"
+version = "1.1.3"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
